What I don't want? 10+ threaded tweets so that people take content meant for blogs and essays and put it on Twitter
What I don't want? 240 characters so people are not encouraged to present most important info in the most concise way
What I don't want? "Things you missed" at the top of my feed showing me shit from 24 hours ago that is old and that I ALREADY SAW
Twitter fundamentally misunderstands their product. I want a concise feed of things that are happening now. A continuous flow of information
hello twitter I'd like to mute all tweets above 140 characters please

I love using @observablehq but I have grown accustomed to working incredibly quickly with @GitHubCopilot and I miss my Robot buddy (I have been working on prompts to get codex davinci to output JS responses in the form of Observable cells, tho)

After you learn to write code, you sometimes feel yourself doing repetitive tasks that can surely be automated, and you do. That is part of the rewiring of a programmer’s mind. I feel that same thing constantly now when I write code “solo” – without a Robot…
The difference between being a programmer and programmer-who-codes-with-AI is a gap almost as wide as the difference between a programmer and a civilian
